customWafRules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-admin") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-login") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/xmlrpc.php") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.env") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.git")

customWafRules.description: Challenge suspicious auth and reset probes
customWafRules.expression: (http.request.method eq "POST" and http.request.uri.path in {"/api/auth/login" "/api/auth/forgot-password" "/api/auth/reset-password"}) and (cf.threat_score ge 15)

customWafRules.description: Block invalid HTTP methods on sensitive APIs

customWafRules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "__proto__") or (http.request.uri.query contains "constructor.prototype") or (http.request.uri.query contains "$where") or (http.request.uri.query contains "<script")

rateLimitRules.description: Rate limit auth, OTP, and password reset bursts
Rate limit checkout and payment mutation bursts
